name: Finistère (France)
description: A white chief strewn with black ermine spots, over a field party per pale: gold with a black lion rampant, and blue with a white ram rampant.
history: The arms combine the ermine of Brittany with the black lion of Léon and the ram of Cornouaille, the historic territories of the area.

features.role: ermine chief over per pale gold with black lion of Leon and blue with white ram of Cornouaille
